prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is E-702 Data/comm & security within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.7 Low Voltage & Specialty. The observed field condition is: untwisted pairs at termination >½ in.. The work is being assessed at the staged lifecycle state with source anchors TIA-568, NEC 800.
title: T3 E-702 Tool & material selection
